header.title: Health Interview
header.subtitle: Answer a few structured questions to prepare a clean summary for your doctor.

current.mainConcern: What is the main problem or reason you want to talk to a doctor?
current.mainConcernPlaceholder: Example: I have had chest pain and shortness of breath when walking.
current.pattern: Is it getting better, worse, or staying the same?
current.patternPlaceholder: e.g. Worse in last 2 days, slowly improving, no change
current.worseWhen: When does it get worse? (e.g. at night, during exercise, after food)
current.otherSymptoms: Any other symptoms along with this?
current.otherSymptomsPlaceholder: Example: fever, cough, weight loss, vomiting, dizziness etc.

history.chronicLabel: Do you have any of these long-term conditions? (tick all that apply)
history.otherConditions: Any other important past illness, surgery, or hospital admission?
history.medicines: Medicines you are currently taking (regular or as needed)
history.medicinesPlaceholder: Example: Panadol 500mg, once daily. Blood pressure tablet (don't remember name).
history.allergies: Allergies to any medicine, food, or other things?

lifestyle.stress: How is your stress level in general?
lifestyle.moodNotes: Anything about mood, anxiety, sadness, or sleep that you want the doctor to know?

summary.hint: Review this summary. You can show or send it to your doctor.
summary.disclaimer: This summary is only to help communicate with your doctor. It is not a medical certificate or diagnosis.

errors.noName: Please enter your full name before submitting.
errors.noSymptoms: Please mention at least one symptom in the current problem section.
errors.generic: Something went wrong while submitting. Please try again.
